1.0.10: Your unsaved edits are now safe — they survive restarts and even crashes!
1.0.9: Bold, italic, and other formatting now display correctly inside table cells!
1.0.8: Tables are now fully editable, and you can drag to resize your document's width!
1.0.7: Files you edit outside Doca now refresh automatically, and the AI can edit files you open from outside your workspace!
1.0.6: AI edits now appear smoothly in place, and opening a file brings Doca to the front!
1.0.5: Chat scrolling is fixed, and your chat panel is now resizable!
